history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

explanation.zh: K72 彩虹面强烈偏向 BTN 的开局范围（范围优势 + 坚果优势）。顶对顶踢用小尺寸 c-bet（25%–50%）：BB 的口袋对、7x、后门听牌会继续付钱，而小注让你整个范围都能便宜施压、被加注时损失也小。
explanation.en: K72 rainbow heavily favors the BTN opening range (range and nut advantage). Top pair top kicker c-bets small (25–50%): BB's pocket pairs, 7x and backdoors keep paying, and the small size lets your whole range apply cheap pressure with little lost when raised.

check.zh: 过牌放掉两条街的价值。干燥面上 BB 很少有反击的牌，没有"设陷阱"的必要。
check.en: Checking gives up streets of value. On this dry board BB rarely has a hand to fight back with — there is nothing to trap.

bet100.zh: 全底池会把 BB 的弱牌全部赶走，留下的恰是能抗衡你的部分——价值变薄而不是变厚。
bet100.en: A pot-sized bet folds out everything worse and keeps exactly what competes with you — value gets thinner, not thicker.

objective.zh: 在范围优势牌面用小尺寸 c-bet 取价值。
objective.en: Use a small range-advantage c-bet for value.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

explanation.zh: 66 在 KQ8 上是脆弱的摊牌价值：下注几乎不会被更差的牌跟注（被跟即落后），也很难把 Qx/Kx 诈走——两头不讨好。过牌控池、保留摊牌价值，转牌再根据行动与来牌决定。
explanation.en: 66 on KQ8 is fragile showdown value: a bet is rarely called by worse (called means behind) and will not fold out Qx/Kx — it accomplishes neither goal. Check back for pot control, keep your showdown value, and reassess on the turn.

bet33.zh: 小注也达不到目的：更差的牌大多弃牌，更好的牌一张不弃——既非 value 也非有效 bluff。
bet33.en: Even a small bet achieves nothing: worse hands mostly fold, better hands never do — neither value nor an effective bluff.

bet75.zh: 大注把 66 变成纯 bluff，可它明明还有摊牌价值——烧掉它得不偿失。
bet75.en: A big bet turns 66 into a pure bluff while it still has showdown value — burning that value is a losing trade.

objective.zh: 识别"下注两头不讨好"的中等牌，学会 check back 控池。
objective.en: Recognize hands where betting accomplishes neither goal, and check back for pot control.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

explanation.zh: A 高干燥面强烈偏向 BTN 范围，整个范围可以小注施压；9♥8♥ 是完美的半诈唬——对手弃牌你直接赢，被跟注还有 9 张同花补牌（到河约 36%）随时反超。
explanation.en: The ace-high dry board heavily favors the button's range, so the whole range can stab small; 9♥8♥ is the perfect semi-bluff — folds win now, and if called you still hold nine flush outs (~36% by the river) to take over.

check.zh: 放过范围压力，还送 BB 一张免费转牌来反超你的 9 高——半诈唬的两条赢牌路径全被关掉。
check.en: Checking surrenders the range pressure and gifts BB a free turn to outdraw your nine-high — both ways a semi-bluff wins get switched off.

bet100.zh: 把半诈唬打成高价纯诈唬：你有 36% 权益兜底，根本不需要为弃牌率支付全池的价格。
bet100.en: A pot-sized bet turns the semi-bluff into an overpriced pure bluff: with 36% equity as a floor, you never needed to pay full pot for folds.

objective.zh: 学会用听牌做半诈唬：弃牌赢 + 补牌赢的双路径。
objective.en: Semi-bluff with draws: win by folds now or by outs later.

history.en: Preflop: CO (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♦8♣4♥：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb，BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop K♦8♣4♥: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb, BB calls.

explanation.zh: 转牌 Q 把你升级成顶两对，同时给 BB 的 Qx、KJ、顺子听牌更多跟注理由——强成手在变湿的牌面要敢做大尺寸：75% 池取足价值，并为河牌的最后一枪铺路。
explanation.en: The turn queen upgrades you to top two pair while giving BB's Qx, KJ and straight draws more reasons to call — strong hands size up on wetter boards: 75% pot charges full value and sets up the river barrel.

check.zh: 顶两对过牌是双重浪费：错过一条街的价值，还让同花/顺子听牌免费抽牌。
check.en: Checking top two wastes a street of value and lets the flush and straight draws peel for free.

bet33.zh: 尺寸与牌力错配：能跟 33% 的牌大多也能跟 75%——小注只是在给自己的强牌打折。
bet33.en: Size mismatched to strength: most hands calling 33% also call 75% — the small bet just discounts your monster.

objective.zh: 强成手在转牌敢于做大价值尺寸。
objective.en: Size up for value on the turn with strong made hands.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 河牌 2♦：BB 下注 10.5bb（约 3/4 池）。

explanation.zh: 面对转牌-河牌的连续火力，A 高需要约 30% 胜率才能平衡这笔 3/4 池的跟注（10.5 ÷ 35），而 BB 这条线上价值组合远多于诈唬组合。纪律性弃牌不是认输，它本身就是 +EV 的决策。
explanation.en: Against turn-and-river barrels, ace-high needs about 30% equity to break even on this 3/4-pot call (10.5 ÷ 35), and BB's line is packed with far more value than bluffs. A disciplined fold is not surrender — it is the +EV decision itself.

call.zh: A 高在这条行动线上抓不到足够的诈唬：对手两条街开火的范围以成手为主，30% 的需求胜率达不到。
call.en: Ace-high cannot catch enough bluffs on this line: a two-street barreling range is value-heavy, and you fall short of the 30% you need.

raise100.zh: 把一手有明确弃牌权的牌变成昂贵诈唬：对手敢在河牌开 3/4 池的范围很少向加注弃牌。
raise100.en: Turning a clear fold into an expensive bluff: a range confident enough to bet 3/4 pot on the river rarely folds to a raise.

objective.zh: 河牌面对持续火力，守住弃牌纪律。
objective.en: Hold the fold-discipline line against river barrels.
